title: Automatic calculation between these two addresses in order to fill in the number of km in the distance column
excerpt: I’m using Monday.com for our company. Our employees keep a ride registration. In the board I designed for this purpose, the employee selects a start and end contact to which a start and end address is mirrored. I would l…

posts.author: DanielAyo (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using Monday.com for our company. Our employees keep a ride registration. In the board I designed for this purpose, the employee selects a start and end contact to which a start and end address is mirrored. I would like an automatic calculation between these two addresses in order to fill in the number of km in the distance column.
Can webhook do something like this?
I would like a button or something as a trigger, so it will calculate it directly instead of waiting 15min like with Make.com or zapier.

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Daniel,

That is absolutely possible and you could calculate it instantly. I would recommend using make.com, rather than Zapier, as it will be cheaper and easier to maintain or update going forward. Depending on your make.com package, you’ll also find that make.com is often very fast and can even be faster than monday.com.

There are many options available, but I’d be happy to develop this integration for you. I have contacted you via DM.

posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml:
I had the same questions than you and actually in my knowledge, there is no other option to use Zapier or Make.
For my part, i use Zapier and the Google Mpas api, and it works fine.

posts.author: MathijsRaes (Mathijs Raes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Daniel,

We have created an app on the monday called [Location Toolkit] (https://monday.com/marketplace/10000366)

One of our functionalities is to calculate distance and travel metrics between two location columns.

I hope this can help you use-case.
